summary: Fixed 6 of 7 PR quality issues in Formula.lean on pr3/temporal-formula and synced to main. Issue 1 (argument order swap) was handled via documentation update rather than code swap because someFuture/somePast/allFuture/allPast are transparent abbrevs and the swaps would break downstream proof system files. Issues 2-7 fully applied: References section, Formula.iff with unicode iff notation, Unicode bold temporal notation, Bot/Top instances, @[expose] public section, removed redundant open. Full CI pipeline passes on main.

artifacts.summary: Detailed summary of all fixes, deviations, and CI results
